testcase.name: test_create_and_delete_note
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_client_centric_messaging.py:300: in test_create_and_delete_note assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create note: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create note: {"note_id":"note_a341bb8968b8","client_id":"demo_client_ce5d46b9","provider_id":"demo_doula_fc5d0af2","client_name":"Olivia Davis","note_type":"Prenatal","title":null,"content":"TEST_NOTE_52606bdd - Delete test","is_private":true,"created_at":"2026-02-19T21:23:40.846353+00:00","updated_at":"2026-02-19T21:23:40.846353+00:00"} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
